unit.description: Normalised currency or measurement unit inferred from context (e.g. 'USD', 'EUR', '%', 'GBP', 'users'). Do not return a unit if the value is null.

scale.description: Numeric scale factor inferred or normalised from the source (e.g. 1000 for 'thousands', 1000000 for 'millions', 1 for 'percentage' or values without a scale). Use null if unspecified. Do not return a scale if the value is null.

anyOf.description: Used only when the reported figure is a range (e.g., '33–37', '120–130') or otherwise non-numeric guidance text. Exclude all units (e.g., $ and %) and scales (e.g., m, bn) from the string.

value.description: Reported numeric value as stated in the presentation. Use a string only when the reported value is a range (e.g., '33–37') or otherwise non-numeric. If unavailable, return null (never use −1, 0, or placeholders when the value is unavailable). Explicitly set to null if the document lacks the figure. Do not infer, estimate, or calculate.

data_period.description: Normalised canonical reporting period label returned in this exact format: 'FY2025 Q3', 'FY2025 H1', 'FY2025 YTD', or 'FY2025'. Use report_period_end_date to ensure that data_period aligns with the fiscal period of report_period, not the calendar date associated with the data values. For balance sheet metrics where data_period is not specified and could be a quarter (e.g., FY2025 Q4), half year (e.g., FY2025 H2) or year (e.g. FY2025), infer the most applicable period from the report_period unless specified otherwise. If no reporting period is identifiable, set to 'NA'.

metric_type.description: Specifies whether the metric represents an actual reported value or forward-looking guidance. Default is 'actual' unless the document explicitly describes the value as guidance.

metric_entry.description: Only use reported values, do not calculate values (e.g., short-term debt + long-term debt to calculate total debt) for this object. For the report_period, aim to return one object for every defined metric ('actual' only), even if unavailable (set value to NA). However, you do not need to create null entries for segment-level data (business_segment or geographic_segment) if the document contains no segment breakdowns. If the document includes values for additional periods (e.g., prior quarters or years), include those as separate entries as well. Ensure the report_period is always represented with a complete set of metric entries. This object defines the common structure for all metric entries, including growth metrics, which inherit from this template.

segment_name.description: Name of reportable business segments or geographic segments. This should be returned as 'NA' when 'segment_type' is 'company'. Extract from the document text (e.g. 'Cloud', 'Retail Banking', 'North America') but do not include 'segment' in the value (e.g., 'Automotive segment' --> 'Automotive').

segment_type.description: Indicates the reporting level of this metric. Use 'company' for consolidated company totals. Only use 'business_segment' for reportable business segments. Use 'geographic_segment' for regional or geographic segments.

comparison_type.description: Specifies the comparison basis: 'Yoy' (year-on-year), 'Qoq' (quarter-on-quarter), 'Ytd' (year-to-date), or 'Ttm' (trailing twelve months).

growth_metric.description: Same structure as 'metric_entry' but used for growth-based metrics (e.g. revenueGrowth, ebitdaGrowth, arpuGrowth). Includes an additional 'comparison_type' property to specify the basis of comparison: year-on-year (Yoy), quarter-on-quarter (Qoq), year-to-date (Ytd), or trailing twelve months (Ttm). These metrics represent percentage or ratio changes rather than absolute values.

company.description: The name of the reporting entity or registrant.

report_period.description: Derived canonical reporting period label in this exact format: 'FY2025 Q3', 'FY2025 H1', 'FY2025 YTD', or 'FY2025'. Must always follow this pattern.

report_period_end_date.description: The calendar date marking the end of the reporting period (e.g., '2024-12-31'). Use ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). This field supports fiscal alignment logic; it should reflect the exact end date stated in the filing cover.

cash.description: Cash and cash equivalents (i.e., highly liquid investments maturing within three months)

commercial_paper_outstanding.description: Commercial paper: Issuance of commercial paper

dividends_payable.description: Declared cash dividends owed to shareholders but not yet paid

goodwill.description: Goodwill: Intangible assets from acquisitions above fair value

total_debt.description: Total debt: Total short-term and long-term debt

inventories.description: Inventories: Total value of inventory on hand

total_assets.description: Total assets: Total current and non-current assets

current_assets.description: Current assets: Assets expected to be converted into cash, sold or consumed within one year

long_term_debt.description: Long-term debt: Debt obligations due beyond one year

short_term_debt.description: Short-term debt: Debt obligations due within one year

accounts_payable.description: Accounts payable: Money owed to suppliers for goods/services received

retained_earnings.description: Retained earnings (often shown as accumulated deficit when negative)

total_liabilities.description: Total liabilities: Total current and non-current liabilities

total_receivables.description: Total receivables: All accounts and notes receivable

money_market_funds.description: Money market funds: Investments in money market mutual funds

accounts_receivable.description: Accounts receivable: Money owed by customers for delivered goods/services

cash_st_investments.description: Cash and short-term investments: Cash, cash equivalents and short-term investments

current_liabilities.description: Current liabilities: Obligations due within one year

shareholders_equity.description: Shareholders' equity: Total equity attributable to shareholders

marketable_securities.description: Marketable securities: Short-term investments in tradeable securities

short_term_investments.description: Short-term investments: Investments with an expected maturity of less than one year

additional_paid_in_capital.description: Additional paid-in capital: Capital received from shareholders above par value

property_plant_and_equipment.description: Property, plant, and equipment: Net value of property, plant, and equipment (PP&E) after accumulated depreciation

basic_eps.description: Basic earnings per share (EPS); net income attributable to common shareholders divided by weighted average common shares outstanding

diluted_eps.description: Diluted earnings per share (EPS); net income attributable to common shareholders divided by weighted average common shares outstanding, including dilutive securities

gross_margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of total revenue. Do not infer, estimate, calculate, or assume.

gross_profit.description: Gross profit (revenue minus cost of goods sold). Do not infer, estimate, calculate, or assume.

revenue_growth.description: Percentage growth in Revenue compared to a prior period. Affix the type of comparison to the end of the metric name (Yoy, Qoq, Ytd, Ttm).

cost_of_revenue.description: Costs directly associated with the production of revenue. Do not infer, estimate, calculate, or assume.

interest_expense.description: Interest expense; cost of debt financing

operating_margin.description: Operating income as a percentage of total revenue

net_income_growth.description: Percentage growth in Net income compared to a prior period. Affix the type of comparison to the end of the metric name (Yoy, Qoq, Ytd, Ttm).

effective_tax_rate.description: Effective tax rate on pre-tax income

income_tax_expense.description: Provision for income taxes (reported as a positive expense or negative benefit)

restructuring_charge.description: One-time costs for reorganization or restructuring

stock_based_compensation.description: Non-cash expense for employee equity compensation

notional_swaps_value.description: Notional swaps value: Total notional value of swap agreements

notional_options_value.description: Notional options value: Total notional value of option contracts

notional_forwards_value.description: Notional forwards value: Total notional value of forward derivative contracts

capex.description: Capital expenditures: Investments in property, plant, equipment (PP&E), and other capitalised assets

shares_issued.description: Shares issued: Number of new shares issued

dividends_paid.description: Cash dividends paid to shareholders, including dividend equivalents paid on equity-linked awards

commercial_paper_issuance.description: Commercial paper: Issuance of commercial paper

share_repurchases.description: Share repurchases: Cash used to repurchase company shares

shares_repurchased.description: Shares repurchased: Number of common shares repurchased and retired

financing_cash_flow.description: Financing cash flow: Cash flows from debt, equity, and dividend activities
